ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gwas_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GWAS study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the study was conducted */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene (e.g., ADAM15) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the gene */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the gene */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the gene */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene in base pairs */,
  "pathway" TEXT /* Pathway(s) the gene is involved in */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the gene (e.g., pathogenic, benign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gene */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the GWAS study */,
  "pubmed_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of PubMed hits for the publication */,
  "pubmed_hits_gene_only" INTEGER /* Number of PubMed hits for the gene only */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES gwas_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_publications_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the disease */,
  "association_strength" REAL /* Strength of association (e.g., odds ratio) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the association */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the association strength */,
  "study_population" TEXT /* Population used in the study (e.g., European, Asian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the disease in the population */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Known risk factors for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gene */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the GWAS study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of when the gene/study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES gwas_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gene */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the GWAS study */,
  "average_pubmed_hits" REAL /* Average number of PubMed hits for the gene */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were last updated */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations for the gene across all publications */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journals where the gene has been published */,
  "citation_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of citations over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_metrics_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_metrics_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES gwas_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gene */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic variant (e.g., SNP, deletion) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the variant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele of the variant */,
  "alternative_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele of the variant */,
  "allele_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the alternative allele in the population */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the variant (e.g., missense, nonsense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_variants_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "gene_id_1" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the first gene */,
  "gene_id_2" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the second gene */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., co-expression, regulatory) */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., physical, genetic) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_relationships_gene_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_relationships_gene_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id_2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
